# PERF-224 negative: iterative walk over flat slice
lang: go
file: PERF-224-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "net/http"

type Node struct {
	ID    int
	Level int
	Kind  int
}

func assignID(node *Node) {
	_ = node
}

func HandleTree(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, flatNodes []*Node) {
	for _, node := range flatNodes {
		assignID(node)
	}
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
